programme.title: Xplash Ep103
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. Today we’ll soar with the North Kiteboarding Team, slackline across the treacherous gorge at Victoria Falls, and we begin this episode with gonzo wakeboarding in Sweden.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep104: Tiger Sharks + Night Diving With Sharks + Blacktip Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV features Tiger Sharks, night diving with Sharks, how shark’s smell, how shark coloration works and introduces us to Blue Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep104
programme.desc: Liquid Edge is surfing barrels on Hawaii’s North Shore, making friends with sharks, enjoying epic waterfalls in Mexico, traveling to Indonesia with professional surfers, hanging ten with one of longboarding’s beauties...and it’s not surfing if you aren’t getting slammed, plus plenty more on Liquid Edge.

programme.title: Blue World Ep705: Endangered Angel Sharks + IMAX Filmmakers
programme.desc: Blue World searches for endangered Angel Sharks in California’s Channel Islands, then teams up with world-renown IMAX filmmakers Howard and Michele Hall to film sea turtles feeding in the Philippines.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep113: Lions of the Deep
programme.desc: In the past 50 years, sea lion populations have declined more than 80% along the North Pacific coast. Scientists at the University of British Columbia, and the Vancouver Aquarium, are working together to help save North America’s iconic and largest pinniped - the stellar sea lion.

programme.title: Lost In Java
programme.desc: A group of world-class professional big-wave surfers travel half-way around the world to attempt to surf a never before surfed 20 foot tube off the coast of Java in Indonesia. Former big-wave World Tour Champion Grant ‘Twiggy’ Baker from South Africa, Hawaiian’s Mark Healey and Billy Kemper along with Australian Ryan Hipwood and Tasmania’s Mikey Brennan, were locked in for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Xplash Ep103
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. Today we’ll soar with the North Kiteboarding Team, slackline across the treacherous gorge at Victoria Falls, and we begin this episode with gonzo wakeboarding in Sweden.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep104: Tiger Sharks + Night Diving With Sharks + Blacktip Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV features Tiger Sharks, night diving with Sharks, how shark’s smell, how shark coloration works and introduces us to Blue Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep104
programme.desc: Liquid Edge is surfing barrels on Hawaii’s North Shore, making friends with sharks, enjoying epic waterfalls in Mexico, traveling to Indonesia with professional surfers, hanging ten with one of longboarding’s beauties...and it’s not surfing if you aren’t getting slammed, plus plenty more on Liquid Edge.

programme.title: Creedlecosm
programme.desc: Volcom presents CreedleCosm, a snowboarding cinematic masterpiece. Starring Mike Rav, Scott Blum, Desiree Melancon, Egan Wint, Seb Picaro, Arthur Longo, Torgeir Bergrem, Pat Moore, Bryan Iguchi, Jadyn Chomlack, Juliette Pelchat, Estelle Pensiero, Jamie Lynn, Alec Majerus and Simon Bannerot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Crosspollution
programme.desc: High voltage shred flick from the Volcom Skateboarding and Snowboarding teams. Starring Benny Milam, Cody Warble, Reid Smith, Lenny Mazzotti, Jack Harold, Scott Blum, Christian Connors, CJ Collins, Axel Cruysberghs, Alec Majerus, Henry Gartland and Mike Ravelson. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Inexact Odyssey
programme.desc: ‘Inexact Odyssey’ is a film about unexpected adventure and endless opportunity. From the winding canyons of Zion National Park to the high alpine passes of Arlberg, Austria, filmmaker Seth Huot uses his Super-8 camera to capture spontaneous travels and impromptu sessions with the Volcom Snow team.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Tchin Tchin
programme.desc: In ‘Tchin Tchin’, the Pusher Bearings crew head to the South of France to do flip tricks and jump off cliffs. Featuring the skateboarding of Kilian Zehnder, Titi Gormit, Robin Fournier, Anto Lopez, Davide Holznecht, and Simon Perottet.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Outta Bounds
programme.desc: Thrasher Magazine and Pusher Bearings present ‘Outta Bounds,’ featuring ledges, hip-hop and skate plazas. Pusher’s international team of technicians knows the recipe. Kilian Zehnder, Nick Dias, Carlos Iqui and more bring the flow from South America to Spain.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Slippery Sardona
programme.desc: Once again, the Doodah skateboarding team goes on a special mission. This time, we turn to the valleys of Sardona, where the mountains are upside down. Skateboarders Timmey Krauer, Christoph Rediger, and Oliver Weismantel. Filmer Christian Taro. Must be watched to be believed.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Cool Green Water
programme.desc: Do you like secret skateboarding spots, remote villages, and massive dams? So do we. The valley of Verzasca is a beautiful biosphere hidden in the Swiss Alps. Featuring skateboarders Christoph Rediger, Timmey Krauer and Samuel Aebi, photographer Filip Zuan and filmer Christian Taro. Mountain magic.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Suscht Guet
programme.desc: SUSCHT GUET is a Swiss skateboard film by Shqipron Bobaj and Tomas Schneider. Featuring Aaron Ulrich, Célian Cordt-Moller, David Nideröst, Dino Brandão, Fabio Prosdocimi, Fin Broder, Flavio Zimmermann, Jànos Herzog, Jeron Breschan, Lorenzo Zuber, Oliver Weismantel, Lukas Bigun, Mike Sidi and more.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Worldly Goods
programme.desc: To celebrate the release of his collection, Louie Lopez spent a week stacking clips between breezy San Francisco and blazing hot Sacramento with a crew of his longtime Volcom teammates; Alec Majerus, Collin Provost, Amos Wilton and Simon Bannerot. Filmed by Ryan Lee, Taylor Phillips and Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Vitals
programme.desc: The Volcom Skate Team putting their latest Vitals Collection to the test in the streets of Los Angeles, California. Featuring Louie Lopez, Collin Provost, Grant Taylor, Axel Cruysberghs, CJ Collins and Chris Pfanner. Filmed by Ryan Lee and Calvin Millar. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: BigWest SouthDown
programme.desc: The Volcom European skate team hits the road in the USA. One big ass van. Some young guns. Some older talent. A trunk full of bags. One generator. Boards. Off we go. Featuring Axel Cruysbergs, Eniz Fazliov, Daan van der Linden, Harry Lintell, Alain Goikoetxea and a few guests. Edit by Yves Marchon.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Golden Shivers
programme.desc: Atoms and Void is formed in the songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. “Golden Shivers” is a beautiful piece of ambient electronic music akin to the works of minimalist composers Steve Reich and Meredith Monk. Good for running, dancing, driving, and doing the dishes. Play loud.

programme.title: Artist Profile - José Medeles
programme.desc: For most artists, music is a way of life. On this episode of the Artist Profile series, we follow José Medeles through a day in the life as he shares his journey from La Salle, Illinois to touring with The Breeders, to founding the Revival Drum Shop and making music as one half of 1939 Ensemble.

programme.title: Marmoset Presents: Bridge City Revival
programme.desc: Bridge City Revival is the acclaimed music collective from Portland, Oregon. Inspired by the soulful 60s, BCR was raised on The Chi-Lites, Otis Redding, Isley Brothers, Lee Fields, and Sharon Jones. Banger drum breaks. Driving bass. Rhythmic guitar. Rolling keyboards. Soulful brass. That’s BCR!

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Happy Recluse
programme.desc: For many years Pete Devries and Jeremy Koreski have been on a mission to surf the best waves Vancouver Island has to offer. In particular, they return again and over to a wave with potential for a legendary session. In the process, Pete tells of his life as a ”Happy Recluse," at home in cold water.

programme.title: Roxy Presents: New Colors
programme.desc: Faced with the winter waters of Norway, four female professional surfers step out of their comfort zone, push their boundaries and redefine their approach to surfing. Beyond competition sites, they reconnect with the pleasure of sharing their passion through a unique cold water experience.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Lobotomy
programme.desc: Set to the music of Frankie and the Witch Fingers, LOBOTOMY offers nonstop surf action. This relentless cinematic climax will leave surf fanatics in a puddle of drool. File under instant classic. Featuring Yago Dora, Jack Robinson, Noa Deane, Ozzie Wright, Balaram Stack and Ryan Burch.

programme.title: Nazaré
programme.desc: Nazaré is a giant wave in Portugal. This footage was captured October 29, 2020, during one of the biggest swells in history. On this day, the German surfer, Sebastian Steudtner, rode a 26-meter wave. This event set new Guinness World Records and established Nazaré as a global surf destination.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Jack of All Tastes
programme.desc: Jack of All Tastes is hosted by Jackie Long and powered by famous athletes and unique eateries. Follow Jackie as he journeys from city to city and dines with NFL athletes and their significant others.

programme.desc: Jack of All Tastes is hosted by Jackie Long and powered by famous athletes and unique eateries. Follow Jackie as he journeys from city to city and dines with NFL athletes and their significant others. Today it is New York.

programme.title: Jack of All Tastes
programme.desc: Jack of All Tastes is hosted by Jackie Long and powered by famous athletes and unique eateries. Follow Jackie as he journeys from city to city and dines with NFL athletes and their significant others.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: Documentary - Abandoned Dreams
programme.desc: The abandoned boat dilemma is one of the most frustrating and alarming issues facing British Columbia's coastal communities. Reaching the end of their life cycle, with limited disposal options and almost no way to track ownership, hundreds of old boats are being left to rot, and sink or drift onto beaches and shorelines around our province. The result is a province-wide problem that affects coastal navigation, tourism and the environment. Abandoned Dreams looks into the root causes of this derelict boat epidemic and the future plans for safe boat disposal and recycling in BC.

programme.title: Arte Equestre TV - Episode 1 - Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021
programme.desc: After several years without an event, Uaipre decided to organize the Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021, and for the surprise of many, it was a huge success. The time needed to organize the event was very limited due to changes in organization, but the will and compromise of all organisers saw outstanding performances from the Italian cowboy dressage riders. We participate in the event and interview both organizers and participants to grasp their overall impressions.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the incredible Okavango Delta, one of the world’s largest freshwater wetlands. This aerial video showcases the vast landscapes, from shimmering waterways to lush forests, while offering a calming atmosphere with soothing music to help you unwind and connect with nature.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Night Sky
programme.desc: Stargazing is a timeless escape that calms the mind. Picture yourself on a hill, marveling at the stunning Milky Way and the serene, quiet beauty of the night sky.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Dive into the serene world of the Red Sea with our latest underwater video. Experience soothing music alongside vibrant coral reef fish, turtles, and other amazing underwater creatures. This compilation includes highlights from our five previous Red Sea Life videos, providing a calming escape for stress reduction and relaxation.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The S version of the Jaguar F-Pace is a tough competitor for Porsche Macan Turbo other rivals. Also: Audi launched its SQ7 as the most powerful diesel SUV on the market. And: the Bentley Bentayga, the first luxury class SUV in the world.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: With its extravagant design the Lexus NX200t definitely stands out. Infiniti, Nissan's luxury division, is more conservative in that regard. The QX30 features a classic Infiniti design with a curved bonnet. Also: the city SUV Mazda CX-3.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Ferrari's California T model heralded a new era for the Italian sports car manufacturer. After its facelift the T was the first Ferrari with a turbo engine since the iconic F40 which was built until 1992.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German manufacturer Roding created a car that even outshined the Porsche GT3 with an impressive power/weight ratio. British makes like the Caterham 620 R, Lotus Elise or Radical RXC also showed what's in play in regards to lightweight sports cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin Vanquish is timeless and carries the strongest engine of the British brand under its hood. Also: Arden gave a Jaguar a power treatment and transformed the F-Type R to their Arden AJ23. And: the Morgan AR P4 roadster.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Alfieri, Maserati in 2014 celebrated their anniversary with the introduction of a beautiful grand tourer. In remembrance and as part of the three-day celebration, Maserati organised a cruise from Bologna to Torino with some of their most iconic cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Lamborghini Huracán Spyder, the Pagani Huayra and Ferrari's 488 Spider don't just look good. Once these super sports cars unleash their power, there is no stopping them. We took a look at these contenders, their features and performance.

programme.title: Because
programme.desc: A high-end freeski documentary following 22 professional athletes across record snowfall winters, facing deep powder, massive cliffs, and extreme expeditions, while sharing their ambition, discipline, and drive to reach the next level of their careers.

programme.title: Begging For Change
programme.desc: This movie is about the lives of strange and exhilarating men, begging for change, and living a life that is fast, cheap, and affordable. All the things that make up a great ski movie

programme.title: Chaiyo Premiere Tour
programme.desc: A skate documentary following a 10-day tour across Thailand, featuring demos and premieres in several cities, capturing the energy of local skate scenes and the passion of skaters coming together to celebrate.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Discovering Symi
programme.desc: Welcome to the beautiful island of Symi, Greece, in the middle of the Aegean Sea. Symi is part of the Dodecanese island chain, located about forty-one kilometres northwest of Rhodes, featuring fifty-eight-point one square kilometres of mountainous terrain.In this series we will discover the beauty of Symi’s capital, Gialos, and its neighbouring district of Chorio as we learn more about the hospitable harbour of the island, a popular resting place for sailors to park up and explore.Symi is home to a long tradition of shipbuilding, handmade boats with real charm. Get to know first-hand this handiwork before visiting the historic castle and taking a ride on a traditional Grecian boat. You will see this apparently small island is filled with a vast variety of things to do, see and eat.Join us on Nautical Channel on our journey to the Aegean Sea to discover the secrets of Symi.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8
programme.desc: The Crikvenica Riviera is one of the most scenic parts of the Adriatic coast with a rich diversity of attractive beaches, green hinterland, a continental wooden area, a climate that provides perfect refreshment in the summer time and just the right amount of action-packed fun in the sun. Find out more in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: Welcome, sailors! In this episode of Sail-ho Croatia we arrive to the incredibly beautiful, fragrant and action-packed island of Cres. The islands of Cres and Lošinj are connected to the ancient legend of Jason and the Argonauts in their search for the golden fleece aboard the Argo. Stick around to find out the best spots in these islands!

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Watch former CT contender fight for the win as the crowd cheers their local hero. The fight for the mens series winner gets even closer at this final event. Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: The Edison Death Machine
programme.desc: Thought only to exist in legend, Edison's device for contacting the dead is found...and stolen. A group of professional thieves go on a global crime spree reanimating the dead in order to steal treasures thought long lost. Things begin to go wrong when they cannot control the creatures, and the machine begins to develop a mind of its own.

programme.title: Death of A Ghost Hunter
programme.desc: Based on true events, a ghost hunter Carter Simms is paid to conduct a paranormal investigation of a suspected haunted house. Along with a cameraman, a reporter, and a spiritual advocate, she embarks on a three night journey into terror.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E01 - Naturally Wild
programme.desc: Many islands lie in the sea between Great Britain and Scandinavia. All of these islands would have remaind snow-covered and life would not have been sustainable were it not for the Gulf Stream. The warm waters flowing through the Atlantic Ocean all the way to South America account for the mild island climate, rich nature and history that reaches back thousands of years. Such are the three islands we are about to visit in today’s Miracles of Nature – Vesterålen, the Fair Isle and the Orkneys.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E02- Naturally Noble
programme.desc: Zimbabwe was initially Southern Rhodesia and lies to the south of the Victoria Falls along the river Zambezi. Zambia was initially Northern Rhodesia and lies on the other bank of the river. Zimbabwe is a landlocked country in the south-east of Africa. It borders with South Africa to the south. According to archaeologists, the earliest records indicate that first human settlements in this area reach back to the 3rd century.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E03 - Kia Under the Bering Sea
programme.desc: Kia dredges for gold on the bottom of the Bering Sea.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E04 - Virtual Gold
programme.desc: Tom and Kia give us a tour of the Cripple River Mining camp, and Tom decides to look for what he calls 'virtual gold!''using left over skyrockets?

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E41 - Fergie The Downfall Of A Modern Duchess
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson, once known as the Duchess of York, seemed to have everything, but her world turned upside down when her name got caught up in a big scandal.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Harry Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E05 - Life and Death
programme.desc: Temperate Rain Forest Pt2. Jim comes face to face with a monster black bear in the coastal rain forest of the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: 9 Lives
programme.desc: 9 LIVES portrays the fate of young people who decided at the age of 11, 12 or 13 to leave home and to live on the streets.

programme.title: Marseille
programme.desc: "German cinema can be this exciting: Angela Schanelec's fourth film MARSEILLE" (taz)

programme.title: Afternoon
programme.desc: On 3 summer afternoons, a family meets up a beautiful house in an upscale Berlin neighborhood. They come together but ultimately drift further apart.

programme.title: In die Welt - Into the World
programme.desc: This moving portrait of a maternity hospital in Vienna provides a fascinating insight into the drama, pain, and beauty of being born into this world.

programme.title: Of Neo-Nazis and Superheroes – How the Far Right is Changing a Small German Town
programme.desc: In the summer of 2017, 6,000 neo-Nazis from all over Europe gathered in Themar for the largest right-wing rock concert of the German post war era.

programme.title: We will survive
programme.desc: At the Julie-Roger-Haus in Frankfurt am Main, a care facility for seniors of all sexual orientations, "grandpa is finally allowed to be gay" (FAZ).

programme.title: Le Ciel, la Terre et L'Homme
programme.desc: The Aït Seghrouchen, a nomadic people from the windswept Moroccan desert, brave sandstorms, watch livestock and the cell phone towers.

programme.title: Blue Summer Symphony
programme.desc: The air smells like summer. A potpourri of suntan lotion lawn and lime blossom fries, of water polo melon and chlorine lemonade hovering in the air.

programme.title: Fall Pinguin
programme.desc: The penguins encounter Swiss alpine cows, swim in the river, walk leisurely through the city center... they are everywhere. An adventure begins.

programme.title: A Cry From Within
programme.desc: Cecile and her family decide to leave NYC for a quieter life away from the city, but soon find themselves victim to evil spirits residing in their new home.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer

programme.title: A Tiger in Winter
programme.desc: On a winter day, when a tiger escapes from the zoo, a man is kicked out of his girlfriend's house. Having no place to go, he wanders from here to there while working as a substitute driver and meets his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Adam and Evelyn
programme.desc: Summer 1989, East Germany. Adam works as a tailor, Evelyn as a waitress. They are planning a vacation together when Evelyn finds out that Adam is cheating on her and decides to leave for the holiday on her own.

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.desc: Gordon reveals the sordid details of why he hates a man who was once in Felicity’s life. A family meeting to discuss a Price family member’s fate ends with a shocking announcement.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E04 - Episode 04
programme.desc: After an ordeal, Felicity faces a difficult choice between an emotionally vulnerable family member and the career she’s worked so hard to build.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E05 - Episode 05
programme.desc: A new job opening at Legacy leaves Sanele and Petra excited. A former in-law wins the family over, except for Gordon and Angelique who remain sceptical of his sudden appearance in their lives.

programme.desc: As Felicity prepares to give back the land, Dineo and Angelique prepare to stand in her way - and with success.

programme.title: Legacy - S01:E20 - Episode 20
programme.desc: Stefan finds himself in deeper waters than he can handle, prompting Willem to make new allies.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: There is panic throughout the nation as the dead suddenly come back to life.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: A recovering heroin addict tries to rebuild his life as a jazz drummer, but crime, manipulation, and temptation threaten to pull him back into his dark past.

programme.title: Suddenly
programme.desc: In the city of Suddenly, three gangsters trap the Benson family in their own house, on the top of a hill nearby the railroad station, with the intention of killing the president of the USA

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it

programme.title: Quicksand
programme.desc: After borrowing $20 from his employer's cash register, an auto mechanic is plunged into a series of increasingly disastrous circumstances which rapidly spiral out of his control

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A group of medical students undertake some silly and frightening endeavors in order to pledge a fraternity

programme.title: The Hardest Part Is Behind You
programme.desc: Don’t judge any one part of your life in isolation or let unmet expectations define your future. God’s not finished with your story, and He didn’t bring you this far to let you turn back now.

programme.title: Not As Long As My Song!
programme.desc: Hitting your limit isn’t a sign of weakness; it’s an invitation to shift your perspective. When the enemy brings the battle to your mind, remember that he only attacks what’s valuable. And God’s goodness is your secret weapon to win the fight.

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God’s trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn’t the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.

programme.title: Sinking In The Storm
programme.desc: When you feel like you’re starting to sink in the storm, call on the name of Jesus. He’s near, and He won’t let you go down. Don’t panic and obsess over the problem, because when you sync up with Jesus, things can change just that quick.

programme.title: Delivered Daily
programme.desc: “God, can You get me out of this?” It’s a prayer we’ve all prayed. But what if God’s answer isn’t escape, but endurance? What if His rescue comes one day at a time? This message will help you recognize God’s faithful provision in every season and learn how to trust His hand as He leads you through.

programme.title: Same Lies New Loops
programme.desc: The enemy loves to trap you in the same old lies: “It’s not enough” and “You’re not loved.” But God’s truth breaks the cycle. When you change what you say, you change what you see, and His presence opens a new loop of peace and hope.

programme.desc: At the Santa María mansion, Clara Inés orders the workers to take Pastora away. Raul arrives and demands that they leave his mother alone.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Aware that Ignacio could take legal action against them, Carlos Raul tells his brother, with veiled intention, that they should stick together.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: At the end of the show, Adriana cries when she remembers that she wanted to be a dancer but could not because of her family's humility; César, moved, feels that he loves her more and more.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Fernando assures Giorgio that they have caught Cirilo Santa María; which urges them to leave the mansion with their victim.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: They think it is Rosa Blanco who unleashed the war between the families. Mother Isabel thinks of communicating the news to Camila who believes that she is her mother. Ezequiel and Fausto, armed, confront each other.

Once at Fernanda's funeral -who preferred to commit suicide rather than go to jail- Leopoldo consoles his youngest daughter Eugenia while Antonieta takes refuge in Felipe's arms; As night falls, Adelaida receives a visit from Victoria, who has arrived in the capital to attend her mother's wedding; however, Adelaida and Hansen have decided to postpone it out of respect for Victoria's mourning; At that moment, the conversation between mother and daughter is interrupted by the visit of Florencia, who, once alone with Victoria, asks her forgiveness for all the harm she caused her; Florencia gives Victoria the rings that Nicolás would use in their marriage and that she will now be able to use when Nicolás signs the divorce. As the days go by, Nicolás and Victoria get married before an altar in the company of their relatives; there, Hilario gives his daughter the Cantarrana hacienda and all his lands as a wedding gift. Clementina agrees to marry Felipe, who is surprised when his beloved informs him that he will soon be a father. Not far from there, Florencia is reunited with Hilario Guanipa, who would like to run away with her, but Florencia asks him to accompany her always. The newlyweds ride through Cantarrana, where Victoria and Nicolás commit themselves to fight for the development of the hacienda and the growth of their family.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila va a encontrarse con una de las Rosas Blanco para saber algo más sobre la niña de la foto que era ella pequeña y el destino de su madre. Está decepcionada porque la mujer no conoce nada y esto la pone triste.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: amila y Max visitan en la cárcel a otra Rosa Blanco. La mujer le confirma que tuvo una hija hembra y casi la convence. Max cree que miente para aprovechar la situación.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en que la mujer presa es su mamá y la Madre Isabel le dice que Rosa Blanco, presa por asesinar a un hombre, no es su madre. El destino entrelaza a las familias en guerra. Buscan identidad de “El Doliente”

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila quiere saber qué hace la Madre Isabel en casa de Elda y le dicen que es ayudar para el orfanato. Camila y Yeli están en la vereda donde la mamá de Camila la abandonó de 5 años asustada y llorosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En los pasillos se rumora que Max apadrina a Camila a cambio de sexo. Un disparo mantiene a Javier sin reacciones. Se enfrentan Camila y Marcelina, siempre por el asunto de su madre y luego Camila decide disculparse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La misteriosa mujer que nombra Marcelina es una incógnita para Camila y Max piensan que están más cerca de encontrarla. Continúa la guerra entre las familias López y Aragón. Max y Camila visitan el orfanato.

programme.title: Amateur
programme.desc: Martín, es un editor que trabaja en un canal de televisión cuyo dueño es el señor Battaglia.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: Distopia
programme.desc: Impulsados por antiguos planes esotéricos, poderosas elites ocultas emplean armas bioquímicas, guerra psicológica, cuarentenas mundiales, e incluso magia negra para controlar el futuro de la humanidad y alcanzar la inmortalidad

programme.title: Er Relajo Del Loro
programme.desc: Un loro que tras ser vendido a unos traficantes de animales cuando era pequeño, va pasando de dueño en dueño durante toda su vida y cambiando su nombre de acuerdo a su propietario, mirando frente a sus ojos la evolución de Venezuela durante 50 años (1950/2000).

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. Todas esas mujeres tienen una particularidad: se llaman María.

programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
